faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Amityville typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground nests and easy-to-reach areas are usually on the lower end, while second-story eaves or concealed nests may cost more. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Amityville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout Amityville and Long Island. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 30-60 minutes. We understand wasp emergencies require immediate attention, especially during summer months when wasp activity peaks in the Amityville area.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Amityville residents most frequently encounter yellow jackets, bald-faced hornets, and paper wasps. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and underground, hornets build large aerial nests in trees and under eaves, and paper wasps create smaller umbrella-shaped nests in protected areas. We safely remove all wasp species common to Long Island.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use EPA-approved products and professional techniques that target wasps while minimizing risk to people and animals. Our technicians will advise you on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, and the area is safe for normal activity shortly after service completion.
